title: Find My Device - Allow Once - IOS [Only This Time - Android] [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Test the "Allow Once" option for Find My Device when the app is connected to HS, verifying that location permission popup appears and Location/Geo icons become visible.
steps: 1) Start the app with HS connected.
expected: After step 3, a location permission popup appears with options "Allow Once", "Allow while using app", and "Don't allow". After step 4, Location and Geo icons become visible.
